topic.title: Assignment 7-8 reference
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Here's a reference you can use for your Assignments 7-8. Don't copy it exactly, use it as a baseline/inspiration and add to it.

https://www.figma.com/design/jgqXigxreK0C99FYsjxZqT/Branding-AI-logo_aesthetics?node-id=0-1&t=UFroFUdYPDLfyLFS-1

 

For logo inspiration, try https://dribbble.com/. 

 

Best,

Arundhati Bandopadhyaya

Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
